title: Hallelujah
meaning_summary: Its extraordinary cover history and enduring emotional resonance make it one of the strongest long-tail songwriter assets in the catalog.
revenue_drivers: Streaming, cover awareness, and film or TV use sustain ongoing replay.
Strong songwriter-side value materially improves retained earnings.
Deep cultural familiarity keeps the song commercially active across generations.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Hallelujah is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
